name: 12p12_PIK3C2G_SD
description: 12p12.3 segmental duplication block over PIK3C2G and adjacent KRAS / SOX5 flank. Contains intra- and interchromosomal SDs paired with PIK3C2A (11p15) and PIK3C2B (1q32) plus duplicons that flank the KRAS hotspot.

architecture.internal_structure: Family-internal SDs of 5-20 kb to PIK3C2A/B; SOX5 large intronic SDs.
